  <svg width="1200" height="730" viewBox="0 0 1200 730" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="README combined preview card">
    <rect width="1200" height="730" rx="24" fill="#020617" />
    <rect x="1" y="1" width="1198" height="728" rx="23" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" />

    <rect x="24" y="24" width="1152" height="320" rx="20" fill="rgba(15,23,42,0.65)" />
    <image
      x="24"
      y="24"
      width="1152"
      height="320"
      href="data:image/svg+xml; charset=utf-8;base64,"
      preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"
    />

    <rect x="24" y="364" width="560" height="156" rx="16" fill="rgba(15,23,42,0.65)" />
    <image
      x="24"
      y="364"
      width="560"
      height="156"
      href="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
      preserveAspectRatio="none"
    />

    
    <rect x="616" y="364" width="560" height="156" rx="16" fill="#ffffff" />
    <image
      x="616"
      y="364"
      width="560"
      height="156"
      href="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
      preserveAspectRatio="none"
    />

    <rect x="24" y="540" width="1152" height="166" rx="16" fill="rgba(15,23,42,0.65)" />
    <text x="44" y="562" fill="#67E8F9" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="700">PROJECTS</text>
    
    <rect x="44" y="582" width="1112" height="50" rx="10" fill="rgba(2,6,23,0.45)" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" />
    <text x="60" y="602" fill="#F8FAFC" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="700">README Styler</text>
    <text x="60" y="621" fill="#CBD5E1" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12">GitHub README 카드 생성 서비스 | 2026.02 - 진행중 | Next.js,TypeScript,Tailwind</text>
  
    <rect x="44" y="640" width="1112" height="50" rx="10" fill="rgba(2,6,23,0.45)" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" />
    <text x="60" y="660" fill="#F8FAFC" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="700">Portfolio 2.0</text>
    <text x="60" y="679" fill="#CBD5E1" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12">개인 포트폴리오 리뉴얼 | 2025.11 - 2026.01 | React,Vite,Firebase</text>
  
  </svg>
